[INFORMASI KONTEKS VISUAL GAMBAR]:
- Deskripsi Visual: A game-style profile screen shows a blue-themed character portrait on the right with various rank and achievement icons and text over a dark, purple-blue background.  

The main visual focus is a stylized, dark-haired, human-like character illustration in the upper right, framed by glowing, ribbon-like purple highlights, with multiple achievement icons and counters displayed around it.  

The setting appears to be an in-app or game interface, with a static UI layout on a dark gradient background that resembles a gaming menu screen. The lighting is graphic and neon-like, with bright highlights and icons in gold, pink, blue, and purple.  

In the upper left, the word “PROFIL” appears in large, light text. To the left-center there is a framed picture containing a person seated or standing indoors, shown as a small rectangular thumbnail with a decorative border. Near the center-left, text lines include “Larangan No.55 Floryn” and “NJZ Starry Bunnies.” Along the left and lower-left areas, several circular and emblem icons are arranged in a vertical and horizontal pattern, including a “58” label under a gold flame-like emblem, a “Rank Saat Ini” label, and another section labeled “Rank Tertinggi.” At the lower-left there are additional icons with labels including “Juara MCL Mingguan 1” and “Star of the Show.” On the right-lower area, there is a shield-like emblem and a label “Guardian Level 7.” At the bottom of the screen, a row titled “Pengunjung Terakhir” shows small square thumbnails.

Practical Summary:
The image is a mobile game profile interface with a character portrait and multiple rank/achievement badges. It also includes a small thumbnail gallery under a “Pengunjung Terakhir” label.

Pertanyaan asli user: Analyze this image for NSFW (Not Safe For Work) / pornographic content / nudity. Reply strictly in JSON format with three fields: 'nsfw' (boolean: true if it contains nudity, porn, suggestive, or nsfw content, false if it is safe/sfw), 'confidence' (number: from 0 to 100 representing the likelihood of nsfw/nudity/suggestive content), and 'label' (string: 'porn', 'nsfw', 'suggestive', or 'safe' depending on the content). Do not include markdown formatting or backticks, just raw JSON.
